name: Divyanshu Dhruv
about: Hi, I'm Divyanshu — an 18-year-old full-stack developer and student who's been coding since 12, now architecting [Basalt3|https://linkedin.com/company/basalt3]{favicon} and exploring MCP servers and environments for AI agents [https://openclaw.ai]{faviconSolo}. Beyond code, I'm a musician and producer, a multi-sport athlete, and a collector of 150+ [Hot Wheels|success]{tag}, including some rare pieces. I live in [India|IN]{flag}, but I have a lot of friends and connections in other countries, lol.
study: I completed my primary and secondary education at St. Patrick's Academy, Dehradun [https://stpatricksdehradun.in|https://framerusercontent.com/images/WJ5i1R1nlykh9L4pTXBmKkrPs.svg?width=21&height=21]{img}, finishing [Grade X ICSE|warning]{tag} while actively contributing to science events and school activities, and then completed my [Grade XII CBSE|accent]{tag} at Delhi Public School [https://dpsvadodara.com|https://framerusercontent.com/images/HGGKn65vMQyHgONQ37tdvdYgMU.svg?width=21&height=21]{img}, Vadodara. In 2026, I also had the incredible opportunity to attend YC Startup School India [https://www.ycombinator.com]{faviconSolo}.
experience:
At Basalt3 [https://basalt3.space|https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/267773509?s=200&v=4]{img}, I lead the architecture of open-source tools for agentic infrastructure and minimal developer workflows. At [Once UI|https://once-ui.com]{favicon}, I collaborate on the design system, UI libraries [https://ui.shadcn.com]{faviconSolo}, and continuous product feedback. At Next Bench [https://next-bench.space|https://framerusercontent.com/images/UxF97MgFC7p8KelqtPYjNbWqzXg.svg?width=21&height=21]{img} I create AI-enabled solution for [students|danger]{tag}, while my [Self-employed|success]{tag} work spans full-stack apps, dev tooling, and early projects in web, games, and mobile.

At WhiteHat Jr [https://next-bench.space|https://framerusercontent.com/images/WJ5i1R1nlykh9L4pTXBmKkrPs.svg?width=21&height=21]{img}, I trained as an app and game developer, learning React Native [https://reactnative.dev]{faviconSolo} and frontend fundamentals, and even winning a [global hackathon|warning]{tag} at 12.
info: I use tools like Obsidian [https://obsidian.md/]{faviconSolo}, Notion [https://notion.so/]{faviconSolo}, Framer [https://www.framer.com/]{faviconSolo}, Paper [https://paper.design]{faviconSolo}, Windsurf [https://windsurf.com/]{faviconSolo}, Antigravity [https://antigravity.google/]{faviconSolo}, Figma [https://figma.com/]{faviconSolo}, Gitbutler [https://gitbutler.com/]{faviconSolo}, WisprFlow [https://wisprflow.com/]{faviconSolo}, Perplexity [https://perplexity.ai/]{faviconSolo}, and ChatGPT [https://openai.com/products/chatgpt/]{faviconSolo} to build structured and clean designed softwares.
